== Notes for [[Item:Q103992|Q103992]] ==

http://www.myheritage.co.il/research/collection-1/%D7%90%D7%99%D7%9C%D7%A0%D7%95%D7%AA-%D7%99%D7%95%D7%97%D7%A1%D7%99%D7%9F-%D7%91-myheritage?itemId=191065971-4-11165&action=showRecord&indId=externalindividual-950dbe11803322d7a57e321a15d5e4c9&mrid=41c950e61829b4422581efd702eff670

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000004953348448

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
